## Pre-review checklist for the PR author

PR author **must** check the checkboxes below when creating the PR.

- [ ] I've confirmed the [contribution guidelines].
- [ ] The PR follows the [pull request guidelines].

## In-review checklist for the PR reviewers

Reviewers **must** check the checkboxes below before approval.

- [ ] The PR follows the [pull request guidelines].

## Post-review checklist for the PR author

PR author **must** check the checkboxes below before merging.

- [ ] There are no open points or they are tracked via tickets.

After all checkboxes are checked, anyone who has write access can merge the PR.

[contribution guidelines]: https://github.com/canonical/charmlibs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md
[pull request guidelines]: https://github.com/canonical/charmlibs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md
